title: Section 3
content: Notwithstanding anything contained in the Police Act, 1861 (5 of 1861), the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, constitute a general police-district embracing two or more 1 [Union territories].
footnote: 1. Subs. by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 3) Order, 1956, for "Chief Commissioners' Provinces".
